full_text:
Zhang Chunhua 張春華
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chunhua (張春華)was born in Pinggao county, Henei commandery. Wife of Sima Yi, she killed their only maid to protect her husband. Zhang Chunhua was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Chunhua lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
